preReview.title: Chicago Fire contra New York City FC: Berhalter busca un lugar en los playoffs de la MLS
preReview.description: El Chicago Fire recibe a New York City FC en la jornada de la MLS de este sábado, con ambos equipos buscando recuperar terreno en la carrera por los playoffs.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire v New York City FC: Berhalter eyes MLS playoff berth
preReview.description: The Chicago Fire host New York City FC in Saturday's MLS action, with both sides looking to make up ground in the playoff race.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire v New York City FC: Berhalter punta ai playoff della MLS
preReview.description: I Chicago Fire ospitano i New York City FC nelle azioni della MLS di sabato, con entrambe le squadre che cercano di recuperare terreno nella corsa ai playoff.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire x New York City FC: Berhalter mira vaga nos playoffs da MLS
preReview.description: O Chicago Fire recebe o New York City FC na ação deste sábado na MLS, com ambas as equipes buscando ganhar terreno na corrida pelos playoffs.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire - New York City FC : Berhalter vise une place en playoffs de la MLS
preReview.description: Le Chicago Fire accueille New York City FC lors de l'affrontement MLS de samedi, avec les deux équipes cherchant à combler leur retard dans la course aux playoffs.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire gegen New York City FC: Berhalter peilt MLS-Playoff-Platz an
preReview.description: Die Chicago Fire empfangen am Samstag New York City FC, wobei beide Mannschaften im MLS-Wettkampf versuchen, im Playoff-Rennen Boden gutzumachen.

preReview.title: شيكاغو فاير ضد نيويورك سيتي إف سي: بيرهالتر يطمح للتأهل للبلاي أوف في MLS
preReview.description: يستضيف شيكاغو فاير فريق نيويورك سيتي إف سي في أحداث الدوري الأمريكي يوم السبت، مع سعي كلا الفريقين لتعويض الفارق في سباق البلاي أوف.

preReview.title: Chicago Fire x New York City FC: Berhalter mira vaga nos playoffs da MLS
preReview.description: O Chicago Fire recebe o New York City FC nas partidas de sábado da MLS, com ambas as equipes buscando ganhar terreno na corrida pelos playoffs.

QAData.question: Who won between Chicago Fire FC and New York City FC on Sun, 14 Sep 2025 00:40:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New York City FC won 3–1 over Chicago Fire FC on Sun, 14 Sep 2025 00:40:00 GMT.
